commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an experimental `claude-cli-interactive` Anthropic backend using a Bun local TLS proxy, plus a scheduled script/workflow to refresh Claude CLI model catalogs.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence failure path: the PR adds Bun-only files under the extension typecheck glob, registers a new provider id without the current Claude stream/reasoning contracts, and emits a JSONL shape the current parser ignores.
commands.review_followup: This is not a safe repair-lane item because the PR is draft, lacks integrated real behavior proof, and needs maintainer security/product decisions around TLS interception and write-capable CI.
